'''鈭歝h-sh-v''' ('''kachashav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ring|ring]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ring|ring]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-sh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kachashav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichashav|thichashav]] || [[word:jichashav|jichashav]] || [[word:shichashav|shichashav]] || [[word:kichashav|kichashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchashav|thuthuchashav]] || [[word:jujuchashav|jujuchashav]] || [[word:shushuchashav|shushuchashav]] || [[word:kukuchashav|kukuchashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchashav|thuchashav]] || [[word:juchashav|juchashav]] || [[word:shuchashav|shuchashav]] || [[word:kuchashav|kuchashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchashav|thuchashav]] || [[word:juchashav|juchashav]] || [[word:shuchashav|shuchashav]] || [[word:kuchashav|kuchashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechashav|thechashav]] || [[word:jechashav|jechashav]] || [[word:shechashav|shechashav]] || [[word:kechashav|kechashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochashav|thothochashav]] || [[word:jojochashav|jojochashav]] || [[word:shoshochashav|shoshochashav]] || [[word:kokochashav|kokochashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochashav|thochashav]] || [[word:jochashav|jochashav]] || [[word:shochashav|shochashav]] || [[word:kochashav|kochashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochashav|thochashav]] || [[word:jochashav|jochashav]] || [[word:shochashav|shochashav]] || [[word:kochashav|kochashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chashav|th忙chashav]] || [[word:j忙chashav|j忙chashav]] || [[word:sh忙chashav|sh忙chashav]] || [[word:k忙chashav|k忙chashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachashav|thathachashav]] || [[word:jajachashav|jajachashav]] || [[word:shashachashav|shashachashav]] || [[word:kakachashav|kakachashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachashav|thachashav]] || [[word:jachashav|jachashav]] || [[word:shachashav|shachashav]] || [[word:kachashav|kachashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachashav|thachashav]] || [[word:jachashav|jachashav]] || [[word:shachashav|shachashav]] || [[word:kachashav|kachashav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachashav|shachashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachashav|goshachashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachashav|gokishachashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachashavn眉|shachashavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachashavnkn眉|goshachashavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachashavn眉|gokishachashavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachashavsh毛|shachashavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachashavnksh毛|goshachashavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachashavsh毛|gokishachashavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachashavro|shachashavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachashavnkro|goshachashavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachashavro|gokishachashavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachashavmu|shachashavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachashavnkmu|goshachashavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachashavmu|gokishachashavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachashavsher|shachashavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachashavnksher|goshachashavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachashavsher|gokishachashavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachashavng|shachashavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachashavnkng|goshachashavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachashavng|gokishachashavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachashavya|shachashavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachashavnkya|goshachashavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachashavya|gokishachashavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachashavyam|shachashavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachashavnkyam|goshachashavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachashavyam|gokishachashavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachashavn眉sh毛|shachashavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachashavnkn眉sh毛|goshachashavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachashavn眉sh毛|gokishachashavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachashavn眉ro|shachashavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachashavnkn眉ro|goshachashavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachashavn眉ro|gokishachashavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachashavn眉mu|shachashavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachashavnkn眉mu|goshachashavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachashavn眉mu|gokishachashavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachashavsh毛n眉|shachashavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachashavnksh毛n眉|goshachashavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachashavsh毛n眉|gokishachashavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachashavsh毛ro|shachashavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachashavnksh毛ro|goshachashavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachashavsh毛ro|gokishachashavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachashavsh毛mu|shachashavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachashavnksh毛mu|goshachashavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachashavsh毛mu|gokishachashavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachashavron眉|shachashavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachashavnkron眉|goshachashavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachashavron眉|gokishachashavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachashavrosh毛|shachashavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachashavnkrosh毛|goshachashavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachashavrosh毛|gokishachashavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachashavromu|shachashavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachashavnkromu|goshachashavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachashavromu|gokishachashavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachashavmun眉|shachashavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachashavnkmun眉|goshachashavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachashavmun眉|gokishachashavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachashavmush毛|shachashavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachashavnkmush毛|goshachashavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachashavmush毛|gokishachashavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachashavmuro|shachashavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachashavnkmuro|goshachashavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachashavmuro|gokishachashavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
